One-sentence summary: A fly visual system connectome-constrained network with 64 cell types and 45k neurons predicts neural responses across 26 studies, enabling whole-brain modeling and linking AI to neuroscience.
Commentary: Fly visual system connectome-constrained network: Deep mechanistic network with fly connectome topology trained on optic flow predicts neural responses across 26 studies; 64 cell types, 45k neurons. Sparse connectivity enables accurate single-neuron predictions. Whole-brain modeling, linking AI to neuroscience, drug testing
